head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Northland and Auckland
Cloudy periods and isolated light showers, clearing by afternoon and becoming fine by evening.
Waikato to Wellington, including the central high country
Cloudy periods with long fine spells during the afternoon.
Coromandel, Bay of Plenty and Gisborne to Wairarapa
Mainly fine. Isolated showers about Gisborne until this evening, and areas of cloud or fog elsewhere this morning.
Marlborough and Nelson
A fine day with areas of morning cloud.
Buller, Grey, Westland and Fiordland
Cloudy periods and isolated showers, clearing from Buller to Westland this morning.
Canterbury
Mostly cloudy with areas of fog possible, clearing to fine by late morning.
Otago and Southland
Mostly cloudy. Patchy light rain clearing for most this morning but isolated showers lingering about Stewart Island.
Chatham Islands
Mostly cloudy with a few showers, clearing this afternoon and fine spells increasing.
Tuesday

North Island: Mainly fine, but isolated showers about Northland, Auckland and Coromandel.
South Island: Showers in the south, spreading up through Westland later. Mainly fine elsewhere.
Wednesday

North Island: Cloudy periods and isolated showers, mainly in the west.
South Island: Showers in the west, becoming heavy and spreading elsewhere later.
Thursday

North Island: Cloudy periods, and a shower or two for most.
South Island: Mainly fine, but a few showers about Buller.
Friday

North Island: Mainly fine, but a shower or two about Northland and Gisborne.
South Island: Mainly fine, but showers about Fiordland.
Chatham Islands

Cloudy periods and a few showers on Tuesday and Thursday, but fine on Wednesday. Cloudy on Friday. Southwesterlies, turning northwest and strengthening on Wednesday, then changing strong southwest on Thursday before easing on Friday.
Issued: 11:30pm Sunday 26 Apr 2026
© 2026 MetService. All rights reserved

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
